# Open the forensics tab and capture each sub-view.
# Tab order: 1=tools (default), 2=worktrees, 3=spend, 4=sessions.
width 140
height 40
wait 200ms
key tab
wait 200ms
capture /tmp/canopy-forensics-tools.ansi
keys 2
wait 100ms
capture /tmp/canopy-forensics-worktrees.ansi
keys 3
wait 100ms
capture /tmp/canopy-forensics-spend.ansi
keys 4
wait 100ms
capture /tmp/canopy-forensics-sessions.ansi
key tab
wait 100ms
capture /tmp/canopy-back-to-ops.ansi
